channel.title: Gnarly Void - adhd
channel.description: Tufted fiber art, weaving, pottery, and handmade objects by Jake Goldsborough in the Pacific Northwest.

item.title: A Tribute to My Lord and Savior, Vyvanse
item.author: site@gnarlyvoid.com (Jake Goldsborough)
item.description: A blue and white capsule inspired by Vyvanse. I was diagnosed later in life and this medicine has improved my life in ways I couldn't imagine. I used to think I was just lazy or apathethic, but turns out my brain just functions differently.
